question: Q1
reason: The paper proposes renaming std::runtime_format to std::dynamic_format. Section 4 contains a code block showing the proposed API in use: `std::format(std::dynamic_format(fmt), value)`. The quote is verbatim from the paper, the applicability rule is met (the paper proposes a new feature/API), and the evidence rule is satisfied (a code block showing the proposed syntax in use).
